verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have made You to small in my eyes, O, Lord, forgive me; And I have believed in a lie That You were unable to help me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But now, O Lord, I see my wrong. Heal my heart and show Yourself strong, And in my eyes, and in my song O Lord, be magnified.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be magnified, O Lord, You are highly exalted And there is nothing You can't do O lord, my eyes are on You Be magnified, O Lord, be magnified.
